meaning: adj.没有洗的,不清洁的,无知的
examples: Their clothes were dirty and their hair unwashed.
Leftover food and unwashed dishes cover the dirty counters.
Remember to clear concertina sections out when you come back from trips to avoid your unwashed briefs billow out onto the boardroom table.
Stopped showing up to the office in blue and orange face paint and unwashed Starks jersey.
Head lice are as likely to infest a clean head as an unwashed one.
